privacy.title: Privacy and Security Policy
privacy.subtitle: At Buildera, your privacy and data security are fundamental. We build with the highest standards of protection and confidentiality.
privacy.encryptionDesc: All your data is protected with AES-256 encryption
personalInfoItems: Full name and email address (required for account)
Professional information (position, years of experience, skills)
usageInfoItems: Performance metrics to improve the service
privacy.privacyGuarantee: Privacy Guarantee: We never access the content of your projects or business data without your explicit consent.
neverDoItems: Sell your information to third parties
Use your data for external advertising
privacy.encryptionDetailDesc: TLS 1.3 in transit and AES-256 at rest
privacy.infrastructureDesc: Servers in SOC 2 certified data centers
privacy.backups: Backups: Multiple regions within the EU
privacy.compliance: Compliance: GDPR, ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II
privacy.rightAccessDesc: You can request a complete copy of your stored data
privacy.rightRectificationDesc: You can correct incorrect or incomplete information
privacy.rightDeletionDesc: You can request the complete deletion of your account and data
privacy.rightPortabilityDesc: You can export your data in standard format
privacy.rightOppositionDesc: You can object to the processing of certain data
privacy.rightLimitationDesc: You can request to restrict processing
privacy.policyUpdatesDesc: We will notify you by email about significant changes to this policy at least 30 days before implementation.
privacy.footerNote: This privacy policy has been prepared in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable data protection laws.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Content: By accessing and using BUILDERA (the "Service"), operated by Innoventum S.A.S. ("we", "our" or "the Company"), you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our service.
terms.section2Content: BUILDERA is an artificial intelligence platform that helps businesses transform into autonomous enterprises through specialized AI agents, automated marketing tools, and competitive intelligence analysis.
terms.section3Intro: To use certain aspects of the Service, you must create an account providing accurate, current and complete information. You are responsible for:
section3Items: Maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials
All activities that occur under your account
Immediately notifying any unauthorized use of your account
terms.section4Intro: By using our Service, you agree not to:
section4Items: Use the Service for illegal or unauthorized purposes
Transmit malicious, offensive content or that violates third-party rights
Attempt to access other systems or accounts without authorization
Interfere with the functionality of the Service
Reverse engineer or attempt to extract source code
terms.section5Content: The Service and all its content, features and functionalities are the property of Innoventum S.A.S. and are protected by copyright, trademark and other intellectual property laws. No rights to our intellectual property are granted to you, except the limited right to use the Service in accordance with these Terms.
terms.section6Content: Your privacy is important to us. Our handling of your personal information is governed by our
terms.section6Suffix: , which is an integral part of these Terms.
terms.section7Intro: Some aspects of the Service may require payment. When making a payment:
section7Items: You authorize the charge of applicable fees
Payments are non-refundable unless otherwise indicated
Fees may change with prior notice
You are responsible for all applicable taxes
terms.section8Content: In no event shall Innoventum S.A.S. be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, data or use, regardless of the legal theory on which the claim is based.
terms.section9Content: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason, including but not limited to breach of these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will cease immediately.
terms.section10Content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Modifications will take effect immediately after posting on this page. Your continued use of the Service after any modification constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms.
terms.section11Content: These Terms shall be governed and interpreted in accordance with the laws of Colombia, without giving effect to any conflict of laws principles.
terms.section12Content: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, contact us at:
